reportTemplateGuide.title: Payment Report Template Guide
reportTemplateGuide.description: Follow these guidelines to create templates that work with Adobe PDF Services
reportTemplateGuide.criticalDesc: Your payment report templates must strictly follow Adobe's formatting rules to work properly.
reportTemplateGuide.rule1Before: All tags must be in the format
reportTemplateGuide.rule1After: with no backticks or special formatting
reportTemplateGuide.rule2After: must be on their own separate line
reportTemplateGuide.rule3After: must also be on their own separate line
reportTemplateGuide.rule4After: an each tag, not wrapped by the each tag
reportTemplateGuide.rule5: Avoid complex Word formatting that might interfere with tag recognition
reportTemplateGuide.bestResults: For best results, create your template in a simple text editor first, then copy to Word and add minimal formatting.
